rationale: This is a Playrix-style "fail" live-action/3D-render hook built around a cat-and-chair gag with a Gardenscapes overlay — it has zero structural relationship to Crowd City's swarm-and-consume loop, low-poly stickman aesthetic, or bright primary palette (member palette is earthy blue/yellow/brown). Casual hypercasual players do overlap with puzzle audiences, but a fail-narrative hook can't telegraph the satisfying snowball mechanic that drives Crowd City's IPM. Recommend skipping this archetype; if testing fail-emotion at all, build a native version showing the player's crowd shrinking/getting eaten before a comeback, not a borrowed pet-fail trope.
